mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_info (device_code, device_name, device_type, owner_id, ip_grade, maintenance_cycle, status) VALUES (#{deviceCode}, #{deviceName}, #{deviceType}, #{ownerId}, #{ipGrade}, #{maintenanceCycle}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE device_info SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE device_info SET device_code = #{deviceCode}, device_name = #{deviceName}, device_type = #{deviceType}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, ip_grade = #{ipGrade}, maintenance_cycle = #{maintenanceCycle}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
